snippet.title: The Battles : Jithendra V Lakshitha | Siri Sangabodhi |  Ahankara Nagare | The Voice Sri Lanka
snippet.description:
The Battles : A R Jithendra V Lakshitha Mihiran | Mashup | Siri Sangabodhi Maligawedi | Ahankara Nagare  | The Voice Sri Lanka

The Voice Sri Lanka

The Voice One of the most successful reality TV formats in the world. Extremely successful in 180 countries. 
SRI LANKA’S NEWEST TELEVISION EXPERIENCE - The Voice Sri Lanka

The Voice is an international reality television singing competition franchise of Dutch origin. It is based on the reality singing competition The Voice of Holland, which was originally created by Dutch television producer John de Mol. The show's format features five stages of competition: producers' auditions, blind auditions, battle rounds, knockouts (since 2012), and live performance shows.

A combined 438 singers have won The Voice, The Voice Kids, The Voice Teens and The Voice Senior in 145 countries/regions. Each winner is given a recording contract, a monetary prize, and a title as that nation's "Voice". 

Official Facebook Page - https://www.facebook.com/TheVoiceSriLankaOfficial
Official Instagram - https://www.instagram.com/thevoicesrilanka
Subscribe Sirasa TV on Youtube : https://bit.ly/3sCpWEz

#TheVoiceSL #SirasaTV #TheVoiceSriLanka #TheVoiceSL #TheVoiceLK #VoiceSriLanka #VoiceLK #lka

Latest romantic music video "#Poronduwak" sung by singer -  #ManejSanjaya .

▶Production: #EvokeMusic

මා ඉන්නම් ඈතකින් නොගැටී ඔය ඇස් දෙකේ 
හැමදාමත් ආදරේ සඟවා හිතේ 
හිමිවීමක් නෑ ඉතින් ලං වූවට ඒ වගේ 
කවදාවත් ඉටු නොවේ පැතුමන් අපේ
අහඹුවක් නොවේ වුනත් මුණගැහීම මේ 
අරන් යන්න බෑ දුරක් ඇසුර තව අපේ 

පොරොන්දුවක් මේක මගේ වෙනස් නොවන කිසිදාක 
දුරස් වුනත් ඔබට හිතේ තියේවි ඉඩ හැමදාක

මුළු රෑ පුරා නින්දෙන් මා මුදා
ඒ මතකයන් හැමදා සිහිවෙලා 
හිත පෑරුවත් කොතරම් විඳ දරා 
ඉන්නම් ඉතින් නෑවිත් යලි සදා

හුරුකම් නිසා සසරේ පෙර එදා 
බැදුනත් ඉතින් නොදැනී නොසිතලා 
හැර යන්නේ නෑ කීවත් දිවුරලා 
අපි මේ භවේ අපගෙන් ගිලිහිලා

snippet.title: The Battles : Miyuru Somarathne V Thilina Sudesh | Bol Pini Wahena Welawe | The Voice Sri Lanka
snippet.description:
The Voice Sri Lanka

The Voice One of the most successful reality TV formats in the world. Extremely successful in 180 countries. 
SRI LANKA’S NEWEST TELEVISION EXPERIENCE - The Voice Sri Lanka

The Voice is an international reality television singing competition franchise of Dutch origin. It is based on the reality singing competition The Voice of Holland, which was originally created by Dutch television producer John de Mol. The show's format features five stages of competition: producers' auditions, blind auditions, battle rounds, knockouts (since 2012), and live performance shows.

A combined 438 singers have won The Voice, The Voice Kids, The Voice Teens and The Voice Senior in 145 countries/regions. Each winner is given a recording contract, a monetary prize, and a title as that nation's "Voice". 

Official Facebook Page - https://www.facebook.com/TheVoiceSriLankaOfficial
Official Instagram - https://www.instagram.com/thevoicesrilanka
Subscribe Sirasa TV on Youtube : https://bit.ly/3sCpWEz

#TheVoiceSL #SirasaTV #TheVoiceSriLanka #TheVoiceSL #TheVoiceLK #VoiceSriLanka #VoiceLK #lka

snippet.title: Asku Maaro Video | Kavin, Teju Ashwini | Dharan Kumar | K. Sivaangi | Dongli Jumbo | Sandy
snippet.description:
Stream now - https://SMI.lnk.to/AskuMaaro

The rollicking music video of #AskuMAaro composed by #DharanKumar starring #Kavin , #TejuAshwini& #Sivaangi is here! This unapologetically fun and groovy song has lyrics by #KuKarthik and is all ready to make its way to your favourite Tamil Playlist and you simply cannot miss this one! 

Song - Asku Maaro
Composed by Dharan Kumar
Featuring - Kavin, Teju Ashwini
Sung by Dharan Kumar & K. Sivaangi
Lyrics - Ku. Karthik
Directed by Dongli Jumbo
DOP - Madhesh Manickam
Direction team - Raaja Senthil | Joshi | Nethan
Dop Team - Ilayaraja , Yuvaraj Dakshan ,Sandy Sanyog.

snippet.title: Reacting to my 'Green Screen Challenge' videos
snippet.description:
I have asked my audience to use the green screen footage I have provided to make a funny and creative video. In this video, I am reacting to a few of those videos and choosing 3 winners, who will be awarded cases of Red Bull cans. There were 200+ entries to this competition and I am super proud of all of you for participating in it. Doesn't matter if your video was good enough or not, I appreciate the effort every one of you has put into your videos. Raspat and keep improving!
*Special thanks to Red Bull for making this possible!

**********************
Green screen entries which I react to in this video in order:

snippet.title: Caroline Jurie සහ Pushpika අතර ඇතිවූ Mrs. Sri Lanka වලිය !!!
snippet.description:
#NoizeNews #SriLanka #MrsWorld 

Chula | Caroline Jurie සහ Pushpika අතර ඇතිවූ Mrs. Sri Lanka වලිය !!!

ඊයේ සවස (04) පැවති ලෝක විවාහක රූ රැජිණ තරඟාවලිය වෙනුවෙන් වූ ශ්‍රී ලංකා විවාහක රූ රැජිණ තේරීමේ අවසන් තරඟය උණුසුම් මුහුණුවරක් ගනු ලැබූවා. අදාළ තරඟයේ කිරුල පුෂ්පිකා ද සිල්වා මහත්මියට හිමිවූ අතර කිරුල පැළඳීමද ප්‍රධාන ආරාධිත අමුත්තන් විසින් සිදු කරනු ලැබුවා.

නමුත් එම අවස්ථාවේදී අදාළ තීරණයට විරුද්දව අදහස් දක්වමින් හිටපු ශ්‍රී ලංකා විවාහක රූ රැජිණ මෙන්ම ලෝක විවාහක රූ රැජිණ ද වන කැරොලින් ජූරි මහත්මිය වේදිකාවට පැමිණ ප්‍රකාශ කලේ තරඟ නීති රීති වලට අනුව කිරුළ හිමිවිය යුත්තේ විවාහක අයෙකුට මිසක් විවාහයෙන් වෙන් වී දික්කසාදව සිටින අයෙකුට නොවන බවයි. එබැවින් අනුශූරතාවය දිනා ගත් තරඟකාරියට කිරුළ ලබා දෙන බව පවසමින් ඇය විසින් , අදාල තරඟකාරියගේ හිසෙහි පැළඳ තිබූ ඔටුන්න ගලවනු ලැබූවා.

විවාහක රූ රැජින කිරුල හිමිවූ පුෂ්පිකා එක් දරු මවක් වන අතර ඇය දික්කසාද වී සිටින බවටයි තොරතුරු වාර්තා වන්නේ. කෙසේ නමුත් මෙවැනි සිදුවීම් හරහා ලංකාවේ Mrs. Sri Lanka තරඟය ලෝකෙටම විහිලු සපයන බවටයි ක්ෂේත්‍රයේ බොහෝ දෙනා අදහස් පළකරන්නේ, මෙවන් ජාතික මට්ටමේ තරග සංවිධානය කිරීමේදී සංවිධායක මණ්ඩලය සහ විනිසුරුවන් වඩාත් වගකීමකින් යුතුව හැසිරිය යුතු බවයි බොහෝ දෙනා අදහස් පළකරන්නේ.

Chula | Caroline Jurie සහ Pushpika අතර ඇතිවූ Mrs. Sri Lanka වලිය !!!

ඊයේ සවස (04) පැවති ලෝක විවාහක රූ රැජිණ තරඟාවලිය වෙනුවෙන් වූ ශ්‍රී ලංකා විවාහක රූ රැජිණ තේරීමේ අවසන් තරඟය උණුසුම් මුහුණුවරක් ගනු ලැබූවා. අදාළ තරඟයේ කිරුල පුෂ්පිකා ද සිල්වා මහත්මියට හිමිවූ අතර කිරුල පැළඳීමද ප්‍රධාන ආරාධිත අමුත්තන් විසින් සිදු කරනු ලැබුවා.

නමුත් එම අවස්ථාවේදී අදාළ තීරණයට විරුද්දව අදහස් දක්වමින් හිටපු ශ්‍රී ලංකා විවාහක රූ රැජිණ මෙන්ම ලෝක විවාහක රූ රැජිණ ද වන කැරොලින් ජූරි මහත්මිය වේදිකාවට පැමිණ ප්‍රකාශ කලේ තරඟ නීති රීති වලට අනුව කිරුළ හිමිවිය යුත්තේ විවාහක අයෙකුට මිසක් විවාහයෙන් වෙන් වී දික්කසාදව සිටින අයෙකුට නොවන බවයි. එබැවින් අනුශූරතාවය දිනා ගත් තරඟකාරියට කිරුළ ලබා දෙන බව පවසමින් ඇය විසින් , අදාල තරඟකාරියගේ හිසෙහි පැළඳ තිබූ ඔටුන්න ගලවනු ලැබූවා.

විවාහක රූ රැජින කිරුල හිමිවූ පුෂ්පිකා එක් දරු මවක් වන අතර ඇය දික්කසාද වී සිටින බවටයි තොරතුරු වාර්තා වන්නේ. කෙසේ නමුත් මෙවැනි සිදුවීම් හරහා ලංකාවේ Mrs. Sri Lanka තරඟය ලෝකෙටම විහිලු සපයන බවටයි ක්ෂේත්‍රයේ බොහෝ දෙනා අදහස් පළකරන්නේ, මෙවන් ජාතික මට්ටමේ තරග සංවිධානය කිරීමේදී සංවිධායක මණ්ඩලය සහ විනිසුරුවන් වඩාත් වගකීමකින් යුතුව හැසිරිය යුතු බවයි බොහෝ දෙනා අදහස් පළකරන්නේ.

snippet.title: රංජන්ට බනාධනාගාරය තුළදී දනිස් කැඩෙනතුරු පහරදෙයි
snippet.description:
https://lrnews.ch/
https://www.facebook.com/lrnews.ch/
Im D.M. Thushara Jayarathna and studied at Ananda Sastralaya, Kotte. Im working as an Investigative Web Journalist For my higher studies, I joined with Sabaragamuwa University, Management Faculty as a management student and after that I joined to Sri Lanka Law College as a Law student. I have won the Gold medal addressing Juri competition and as well as I was the Captain of Law College Debating Team. 
 
I'm the one who made complain against Mr. Namal Rajapaksha, son of former president Mr. Mahinda Rajapaksha regarding cheating the Law College Examination. After that incident, I faced political problems and life threats. Due to this reason, In the year of 2012 I left my country and currently I'm living in Switzealand. 
 
 
I dedicated my life to establish Democracy and Rule of Law of my country.

snippet.title: Kutty Pattas Music Video | Ashwin | Reba John | Venki | Santhosh Dhayanidhi | Sandy
snippet.description:
A brilliantly vivid splash of colours and a wildly fun #KuttyPattas composed by the Raati fame #SanthoshDhayanidhi featuring the most exciting cast one could ask for! Is there a better way to head into the weekend? #Ashwin, the current darling of Tamil Television features alongside the stunningly beautiful #RebaJohn in this groovy music video directed by #Venky and choreographed by #Sandy. Watch it here and bring out the moves !

en-GB.description:
A brilliantly vivid splash of colours and a wildly fun #KuttyPattas composed by the Raati fame #SanthoshDhayanidhi featuring the most exciting cast one could ask for! Is there a better way to head into the weekend? #Ashwin, the current darling of Tamil Television features alongside the stunningly beautiful #RebaJohn in this groovy music video directed by #Venky and choreographed by #Sandy. Watch it here and bring out the moves !

Music Pickle program එකට ආදරේ කරන ඔයාලා ගොඩාක් දෙනෙක්ට අද අපි අමුතුම නාඩගමක් පෙන්නන්නයි මේ ලෑස්ති වෙන්නේ. ඉතින් නාඩගමක් පෙන්නන්න නම් නාඩගම්කාරයෝ ගේන්න ඕනෙනේ. ඒ නිසාම අපි අද අපේ program එකට එකතු කරගත්තේ මේ දිනවල ඉහල ජනාදරයට පාත්‍ර වෙලා තියෙන නාඩගම්කාරයෝ ටෙලිනාට්‍යයේ මනමාලන් හෙවත් මාලන් ලෙසින් රංගනයෙන් දායක වන කෝකිල පවන් ජයසූරිය සහ සරාගේ හොදම මිතුරා වන කවඩියාගේ චරිතයෙන් අපි අතරට එන සංගීත් ප්‍රභූ යන නාඩගම්කාරයෝ දෙදෙනාවයි. ඉතින් මේ දෙන්නාම හරිම ජනප්‍රිය, කඩවසම්,ආදරණීය තරුණයන් දෙන්නෙක් නිසා program එකට අලුත්ම අලංකාරයක් එකතු වුණා. ඒ වගේම මේ program එකට අලුත් segments කීපයක්මත්  එකතු කරන්න, Music Pickle අපි අමතක කළේ නෑ. මේ සතියේ මේ අලුත්ම නාඩගම බලන්න එකතුවෙන්න Music Pickle සමගින්.

Follow Kokila : https://www.instagram.com/kokila_pawan_jayasooriya/
Follow Sangeeth : https://www.instagram.com/sangeeth_prabhu/

Producer : Dilini Madusanka Perera

About Puthiya Thalaimurai TV

 Puthiya Thalaimurai TV (Tamil: புதிய தலைமுறை டிவி) is a 24x7 live news channel in Tamil launched on August 24, 2011.Due to its independent editorial stance it became extremely popular in India and abroad within days of its launch and continues to remain so till date.The channel looks at issues through the eyes of the common man and serves as a platform that airs people's views.The editorial policy is built on strong ethics and fair reporting methods that does not favour or oppose any individual, ideology, group, government, organisation or sponsor.The channel’s primary aim is taking unbiased and accurate information to the socially conscious common man.
 
Besides giving live and current information the channel broadcasts news on sports,  business and international affairs. It also offers a wide array of week end programmes.
 
The channel is promoted by Chennai based New Gen Media Corporation. The company also publishes popular Tamil magazines- Puthiya Thalaimurai and Kalvi.

වේවී ඇස් පියා ගන්න... 

මේ ජීවිතයේ කදුල 
මට ලගා කළත් ඔබව
ආදරේ තරම් නොදැන 
ඔබ ඉන්න එකයි පුදුම
ආදරේ රකින්න 
හැකි නම් පොරොන්දු වෙන්න
ඔබ ගියෝතින් ඔන්න
වේවී ඇස් පියා ගන්න...

snippet.title: Nayanthara Latest Superhit Tamil Movie | Jai Simha | Balakrishna | Natasha Doshi | KS Ravi Kumar
snippet.description:
Watch Jai Simha Full Movie.

Starring: Balakrishna​, #Nayanthara​, Hari Priya​, Natasha Doshi​ and others.
Director: KS Ravi Kumar
Producer: I & M Studios
Music: Chirantan Bhatt​

Synopsis:
Narasimha(Balakrishna) along with his just-born son moves to Kumbakonam and starts working as a driver. There, he comes across a corrupt cop and keeps fighting with him time and again. During one of the key problems involving the cop, Narasimha suddenly finds out that the cop’s wife is none other than his ex-girlfriend Gauri(Nayanthara). Who is this Narasimha? Why did he come to Kumbakonam? What is his backstory with Gauri?

snippet.title: Jai Sulthan Video (Tamil) - Sulthan | Karthi, Rashmika | Vivek-Mervin | Anirudh | Bakkiyaraj Kannan
snippet.description:
Dream Warrior Pictures Proudly Presents the Video Song of “Jai Sulthan” From Karthi's #Sulthan, Directed By Bakkiyaraj Kannan. #Karthi | #RashmikaMandanna | #BakkiyarajKannan | #VivekMervin | #Anirudh  | #SRPrabhu | #DreamWarriorPictures

Song: Jai Sulthan
Music: VIVEK - MERVIN
Lyrics: Viveka
Singers: Anirudh Ravichander, Junior Nithya & Gana Guna

Wynk Music: https://wynk.in/u/j7ooonu7M

*பாடல் வரிகள்*

சண்டையில கீயாத 
சட்டையில்லா குமாரே

ஹேய் …ஹேய் 
ஹேய் …ஹேய் 

மண்டை ரெண்டா போவாட்டா 
சண்டை ரொம்ப சுமாரே 

ஹேய் …ஹேய் 
ஹேய் …ஹேய் 

ஏய்...தாதாமாரே .....
என் தெளலத்மாரே.... 
அட அன்ப கொட்டும் 
என்  அண்ணன்மாரே ....

ஏய்...தாதாமாரே....
என் தெளலத்மாரே ....
அட அன்ப கொட்டும் 
என் அண்ணன்மாரே .....

ஏய் மத்தநாளு கிதான்றதே,சந்தேக கேசே ….
இங்க மன்ஷனுங்க ,எல்லாருமே  காமடி பீசே ...
நீ வாயகட்டி  வயத்தகட்டி ,சேக்காத காசே ...
சோறு துண்ணும்போது விக்கிச்சீனா 
எல்லாம் குளோசே ...

வா...சுல்தான் ,வா...சுல்தான்...
வா ...சுல்தான் ,வா ...சுல்தான் ...
வா....

உனக்குன்னுதான் ,தரவா.. தரவா 
உசுர தரவா..
கலக்குறியே சுல்தான் 
வா சுல்தான் ,வா சுல்தான் 
வா சுல்தான் ,வா ...

உனக்குன்னுதான்,தரவா …தரவா 
உசுர தரவா...

ஏய்...தாதாமாரே,என் தெளலத்மாரே ...
அட அன்ப கொட்டும் ,என் அண்ணன்மாரே...


ஹே நிக்கல் ,ஹே குந்தல் 
ஹே நிக்கல் ,ஹே குந்தல் 
ஹே நிக்கல் ,ஹே குந்தல் 
ஹே நிக்கல் ,ஹே குந்தல் 
ஹே நிக்கல் குந்தல்,
நிக்கல் குந்தல்
நிக்கலு  குந்தல்
நிக்கலு குந்தலு 

சபா டேய் ....
வயசாகுது  டா...
அய்யயோ …
அடங்கமாட்டீங்களா டா …

டேய்..
ஹே ஊரில் ரொம்ப பெரு 
மூஞ்ச உத்து பாரு ,
பூரான் உட்டு இருப்போம் 


மொரட்டு பீஸு …எல்லாம் ….
உருட்டு கட்டையால…
பொரட்டி …போட்டி …எடுப்போம் 
ஊய் ..சொக்கா மாட்டிகினு 
சோலி பாக்க …போனா 
தொக்க ஆல …புடிப்போம் 
பீடா போட்டமேறி …வாய கோயப்பிட்டு 
டாடா காட்டி …வருவோம் 

சம்பவம் செய்யும் வேலைய எல்லாம் 
அஞ்சாறு வாரம் ஒத்தி போடு ….
வம்புக்கு யாரும் வந்தாலும் கூட …
வள்ளலார் போல வணக்கம் போடு 

வா...சுல்தான் ,வா...சுல்தான்...
வா ...சுல்தான் ,வா ...சுல்தான் ...
வா.... 
உனக்குன்னுதான்,தரவா தரவா 
உசுர தரவா...

வா...சுல்தான்,வா...சுல்தான்...
வா ...சுல்தான் ,வா ...சுல்தான் ...
வா.... 

உனக்குன்னுதான், தரவா  தரவா 
உசுர தரவா...
தூக்கி சொல்லு….

வா சுல்தான் , வா சுல்தான் 
வா சுல்தான் ,வா ...

உனக்குன்னுதான் தரவா  தரவா 
உசுர தரவா...

சண்டையில கீயாத ,சட்டையில்லா குமாரே
மண்டை ரெண்டு போவாட்டா, சண்டை ரொம்ப சுமாரே 

சண்டையில கீயாத, சட்டையில்லா குமாரே
மண்டை ரெண்டா போவாட்டா ,சண்டை ரொம்ப சுமாரே 

சண்டையில கீயாத ,சட்டையில்லா குமாரே
மண்டை ரெண்டா போவாட்டா, சண்டை ரொம்ப சுமாரே …

Song Lyrics:
මේ කියන්නෙ ජිවිතෙ ඇත්තම කතාවක් මන් 
ප්‍රර්තනා සුන් වු මගක් නැති වු කෙනෙක් අද මන් 
හඩවන්න ඕන ඕන ඕන විදියට නැ දුකක් මට 
හැමොටම පේන පේන පේන විදියට වැරදි කරු මම 

සුදු මුහුනේ පින් පාට - අඩු නැතිවම තිබුනාට 
නුබ වාගේ සැර පරුෂ - කෙල්ලෙක් නැ දැක්කෙ මම

අනන්තවත් රැයවල් පහන් කලේ -හෙට ඔයා මගෙන් මග හැරෙයි බියෙ
වෙලාව දැන් - ඇවිදින් වගෙ ලදේ
කතාව දැන් - අහවර වෙලා අපේ

සුදු මුහුනේ....

බලන්න වත් -කවුරුත් නැතත් ඔහේ 
මම හිනා වෙලා - ඉන්නවා හොදේ 
අපායකින් ගැලවි -ගියා වගේ 
හැගිමකුයි ඇත්තෙ මගෙ හිතෙ

snippet.title: The Battles : Sathisha Bhatt V Pavi Kalpani | Nagada Sang Dhol | The Voice Sri Lanka
snippet.description:
The Voice Sri Lanka

The Voice One of the most successful reality TV formats in the world. Extremely successful in 180 countries. 
SRI LANKA’S NEWEST TELEVISION EXPERIENCE - The Voice Sri Lanka

The Voice is an international reality television singing competition franchise of Dutch origin. It is based on the reality singing competition The Voice of Holland, which was originally created by Dutch television producer John de Mol. The show's format features five stages of competition: producers' auditions, blind auditions, battle rounds, knockouts (since 2012), and live performance shows.

A combined 438 singers have won The Voice, The Voice Kids, The Voice Teens and The Voice Senior in 145 countries/regions. Each winner is given a recording contract, a monetary prize, and a title as that nation's "Voice".

snippet.title: හැමදාමත් මිනිස්සුන්ගෙන් බලු බැනුම් අහන පියුමි හංසමාලි හැමෝම සංවේදී කරමින් කරපු වැඩේ Piumi Hansamali
snippet.description:
අනේ දෙයියනේ ඒකට නම් පපුව පිච්චිලා ගියා
"ඒකත් ඕනෙද පුතේ,හා ගන්න
ඔච්චර කන්න බෑනේ පාරේ තියාගෙන,දියවෙනවනෙ.."
මිනිස්සුන්ගෙන් බලු බැනුම් අහන පියුමි හංසමාලි වීදි දරුවෝ දෙන්නෙක් සුපර් මාකට් එකකට එක්ක ගිහින් හැමෝම සංවේදී කරමින් කරපු වැඩේ වීඩියෝව මෙන්න.  Piumi Hansamali

snippet.title: Obata Man Hoda Madi Nam (ඔබට මං හොද මදි නම්) - Ayesh Jayathilaka 2021 | New Sinhala Songs 2021
snippet.description:
Obata Man Hoda Madi Nam
Artist - Ayesh Jayathilaka 
Music Rearrangement - Nilan Fernando
Lyrics - Dhanushka Gunathilaka
Production - Naada Creations 

Set As Your Favorite Ringtone 👇
☎ Dialog - Soon
☎ Hutch - 369281038
☎ Mobitel - 74741123
☎ Etisalat - 369281038

ඔබට මං හොඳ මදිනම් සමාවී කියන්න රත්තරනේ
ආදරේ මදි වීනම් සමුගන්න නෑ තරහ වෙන්නේ
අතින් අල්ලා ආව ගමනේ නොයා දුර මෙතනින් නවතින්නම්
ඔබට මං හොඳ මදිනම් සමාවී කියන්න රත්තරනේ //

රැවල් ඉරිලා සෙනෙහෙ නැව අපගේ දියඹේ ඈත මහ සයුරේ
ඔයා කෝ මං කෝ දෙතැනක ඇයිද අපි මේ වෙන් වෙලා යන්නේ
දිනක් දිව්රා කියූ ඔබෙ ආදරේ අද ඇයිද නතරවුනේ
ඔබට මං......

ආපු දුර ආයේ හැරිලා බැලුවොත් නොමැකෙන මතකයක් විතරයි
ඔයා මැව් ලස්සන ලෝකේ හීනයක් අද වචනයක් පමනයි
දිනක් දිව්රා කියූ ඔබෙ ආදරේ අද ඇයිද නතරවුනේ
ඔබට මං......

snippet.title: රටම මවිත කරමින් නිකවැරටියේදී  තරුණියකට ජීවිතය දුන් පොලිස් නිලධාරියාගේ ඔබ නොදත් කතාව මෙන්න.
snippet.description: රථ වාහන පරික්ෂාවේ යෙදීසිටි ට්‍රැෆික් පොලිස් නිලධාරියෙකු වෑන් රථයක් පරික්ෂා කිරීමේදී එහි සිටි තරුණියක් එකවරම කියූ දෙයින් පොලිස් නිලධාරියාගේ ඉහමොළ රත්වෙයි. පොලිස් ස්ථානයට පැමිණි තරුණිය හෙලිකල දෙයින් කාගේත් ඇස් උඩ යයි.

snippet.title: B&B එක්ක අවුරුදු  - Episode 1 |  Naveen Dilshan & Hansini Wimalsiri - B&B
snippet.description:
B&B මේ සැරේ අවුරුද්දට, අවුරුදු කෑම හදන challenge එක මුලින්ම බාරගත්තෙ මේ දවස්වල ජනප්‍රියම ටෙලි තරු යුවලක් වුනු "සංගීතේ" ටෙලි කතා මාලාවේ තිසංක සර් සහ නිශානි ටීචර්. අපි ඒ දෙන්නට දුන්න challenge එක තමයි "රසට මුංගුලි හදන්න" කියන එක. 
නිශානි ටීචර් තිසංක සර් එක්ක එකතු වෙලා මුංගුලි හදපු විදිය වගේම අපි අහපු ප්‍රශ්න වලට පිළිතුරු දුන්නේ මෙහෙමයි .

snippet.title: Kodiyil Oruvan - Official Trailer | Vijay Antony | Aathmika | Ananda Krishnan | Nivas K Prasanna
snippet.description:
Presenting the Official Trailer of the Action Political Drama movie Kodiyil Oruvan. 

Kodiyil Oruvan is an upcoming movie that has Vijay Antony and Aathmika playing the lead roles. Directed by Ananda Krishnan and Music by Nivas K Prasanna.

Credits:

Movie : Kodiyil Oruvan
Starring: Vijay Antony, Aathmika, Ramachandra Raju, Prabhakar & Others
Writer & Director: Ananda Krishnan
Producer: T.D. Rajha & D.R. Sanjay Kumar (Chendur Film International)
Co Producer: Kamal Bohra, Lalitha Dhananjayan, B. Pradeep, Pankaj Bohra, S. Vikram Kumar 
Music: Nivas K Prasanna
Cinematographer: N.S. Uthaya Kumar
Editor: Vijay Antony
Art director: Pappanadu C. Uthayakumar
BGM Composer: Harish Arjun
Lyricists: Mohanrajan, Arun Bharathi A, Subbu
Stunt master: Mahesh Mathew
Choreographer: Hari Kiran
Costume Designers: Sowbarnika
Production Executive: P. Pandiyan
DI: B2H
DIT: Janarthanan

snippet.title: Goodbye Old Stuff! Hammer Jam is BACK! (Clash Of Clans Official)
snippet.description:
The Hammer Jam event is back and it's the season of upgrades! Take full advantage of the 50% Home Village building cost reduction, and get ready for the first update of the year that's coming veeeery soon! 👀


Follow us on our Socials!
Twitter ► https://twitter.com/ClashofClans/
Instagram ►https://www.instagram.com/clashofclans 
Facebook ►https://www.facebook.com/ClashofClans 

Attack. Defend. Strategize. Download for free for mobile devices. http://supr.cl/ThisArmy

From rage-­filled Barbarians with glorious mustaches to pyromaniac wizards, raise your own army and lead your clan to victory! Build your village to fend off raiders, battle against millions of players worldwide, and forge a powerful clan with others to destroy enemy clans.
PLEASE NOTE! Clash of Clans is free to download and play, however some game items can also be purchased for real money 

Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 13 years of age to play or download Clash of Clans.
A network connection is also required.

FEATURES
- Build your village into an unbeatable fortress 
- Raise your own army of Barbarians, Archers, Hog Riders, Wizards, Dragons and other mighty fighters
- Battle with players worldwide and take their Trophies
- Join together with other players to form the ultimate Clan
- Fight against rival Clans in epic Clan Wars 
- Build 18 unique units with multiple levels of upgrades
- Discover your favorite attacking army from countless combinations of troops, spells, Heroes and Clan reinforcements 
- Defend your village with a multitude of Cannons, Towers, Mortars, Bombs, Traps and Walls
- Fight against the Goblin King in a campaign through the realm

Chief, are you having problems? Visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/clas...

Privacy Policy:
http://www.supercell.net/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
http://www.supercell.net/terms-of-ser...

Parent’s Guide:
http://www.supercell.net/parents

#clashofclans #hammerjam #seasonofupgrades

About Puthiya Thalaimurai TV

 Puthiya Thalaimurai TV (Tamil: புதிய தலைமுறை டிவி) is a 24x7 live news channel in Tamil launched on August 24, 2011.Due to its independent editorial stance it became extremely popular in India and abroad within days of its launch and continues to remain so till date.The channel looks at issues through the eyes of the common man and serves as a platform that airs people's views.The editorial policy is built on strong ethics and fair reporting methods that does not favour or oppose any individual, ideology, group, government, organisation or sponsor.The channel’s primary aim is taking unbiased and accurate information to the socially conscious common man.
 
Besides giving live and current information the channel broadcasts news on sports,  business and international affairs. It also offers a wide array of week end programmes.
 
The channel is promoted by Chennai based New Gen Media Corporation. The company also publishes popular Tamil magazines- Puthiya Thalaimurai and Kalvi.

About Polimer News:

Polimer News brings unbiased News and accurate information to the socially conscious common man.

Polimer News has evolved as a 24 hours Tamil News satellite TV channel. Polimer is the second largest MSO in TN catering to millions of TV viewing homes across 10 districts of TN. Founded by Mr. P.V. Kalyana Sundaram, the company currently runs 8 basic cable TV channels in various parts of TN and Polimer TV, a fully integrated Tamil GEC reaching out to millions of Tamil viewers across the world. The channel has state of the art production facility in Chennai. Besides a library of more than 350 movies on an exclusive basis , the channel also beams 8 hours of original content every day. The channel has extended its vision to various genres including Reality. In short, Polimer is aiming to become a strong and competitive channel in the GEC space of Tamil Television scenario. Polimer’s biggest strength is its people. The channel has some of the best talent on its rolls. A clear vision backed by the best brains gives Polimer a clear cut edge in the crowded Tamil TV landscape.

snippet.title: Suez Canal: Tugboats sound horns as Ever Given container ship 'fully refloated'
snippet.description:
The giant container ship that has been blocking the Suez Canal was fully floated on Monday afternoon, according to the Suez Canal Authority (SCA), with footage shared online showing the vessel moving in the channel.

After hauling the fully laden 220,000-ton vessel over the canal bank, the salvage team was pulling the vessel toward the Great Bitter Lake, a wide stretch of water halfway between the north and south end of the canal, where the ship will undergo technical inspection, canal authorities said.

Satellite data from MarineTraffic.com confirmed that the ship was moving away from the shoreline toward the center of the artery.

Read more here: https://www.telegraph.co.uk/news/2021/03/29/suez-canal-ever-given-container-ship-partially-refloated/

Subscribe to The Telegraph on YouTube ► https://bit.ly/3idrdLH

Get the latest headlines: https://www.telegraph.co.uk/

snippet.title: Bus එකක් පදින ලංකාවේ එකම කාන්තාව | Point Of Pavithra  | Lakshi Sajintha
snippet.description:
ශ්‍රී ලංකාවේ සංස්කෘතිය තුළ කාන්තාව යනු කුස්සිය මුල්ලට සීමා වූ ජිවිතයකි. නමුත් කාලයත් සමඟ දැන් දැන් ඒ සංස්කෘතිය වෙනස් වෙමින් පවති. මේ කියන්න යන්නේ ඒ සංස්කෘතිය අතික්‍රමණය කරපු highway බස් එකක් ධාවනය කරන ලංකාවේ එකම සහ ප්‍රථම කාන්තාව ගැනයි.

localized.description:
ශ්‍රී ලංකාවේ සංස්කෘතිය තුළ කාන්තාව යනු කුස්සිය මුල්ලට සීමා වූ ජිවිතයකි. නමුත් කාලයත් සමඟ දැන් දැන් ඒ සංස්කෘතිය වෙනස් වෙමින් පවති. මේ කියන්න යන්නේ ඒ සංස්කෘතිය අතික්‍රමණය කරපු highway බස් එකක් ධාවනය කරන ලංකාවේ එකම සහ ප්‍රථම කාන්තාව ගැනයි.

snippet.title: Stuck at sea: Cargo ship wedged in Suez Canal causes traffic jam
snippet.description:
Tug boats and a digger are struggling to free a mega cargo ship, blocking one of the world's busiest shipping pathways.

Dozens of ships are stuck because a container ship almost half a kilometre long is wedged across the waterway.

Listen to the Sky News Daily podcast on the impact of the cargo ship's blockage of the Suez Canal - https://news.sky.com/story/wedged-in-the-suez-how-a-mega-ship-brought-the-canal-to-a-standstill-12261097

About Puthiya Thalaimurai TV

 Puthiya Thalaimurai TV (Tamil: புதிய தலைமுறை டிவி) is a 24x7 live news channel in Tamil launched on August 24, 2011.Due to its independent editorial stance it became extremely popular in India and abroad within days of its launch and continues to remain so till date.The channel looks at issues through the eyes of the common man and serves as a platform that airs people's views.The editorial policy is built on strong ethics and fair reporting methods that does not favour or oppose any individual, ideology, group, government, organisation or sponsor.The channel’s primary aim is taking unbiased and accurate information to the socially conscious common man.
 
Besides giving live and current information the channel broadcasts news on sports,  business and international affairs. It also offers a wide array of week end programmes.
 
The channel is promoted by Chennai based New Gen Media Corporation. The company also publishes popular Tamil magazines- Puthiya Thalaimurai and Kalvi.

About Puthiya Thalaimurai TV

 Puthiya Thalaimurai TV (Tamil: புதிய தலைமுறை டிவி) is a 24x7 live news channel in Tamil launched on August 24, 2011.Due to its independent editorial stance it became extremely popular in India and abroad within days of its launch and continues to remain so till date.The channel looks at issues through the eyes of the common man and serves as a platform that airs people's views.The editorial policy is built on strong ethics and fair reporting methods that does not favour or oppose any individual, ideology, group, government, organisation or sponsor.The channel’s primary aim is taking unbiased and accurate information to the socially conscious common man.
 
Besides giving live and current information the channel broadcasts news on sports,  business and international affairs. It also offers a wide array of week end programmes.
 
The channel is promoted by Chennai based New Gen Media Corporation. The company also publishes popular Tamil magazines- Puthiya Thalaimurai and Kalvi.

හමුවුනු තැන මන් ඉන්නම්...
දැකගන්නට ඔබව..
හමුවෙවි කවදා හො...ආ ගිය මගක අප..

හිත ඇතුලේ තිබ්බ සෙනේ..පිරිසිදු වැඩිකමට..

snippet.title: Nuwandhika Senarathna - Sihinayak Mawna (සිහිනයක් මැව්නා) | Iskole Teledrama Song | eTunes
snippet.description:
Artist - Nuwandhika Senarathna
Music - Nimesh Kulasinghe 
Lyrics - Shehan Galahitiyawa

සිහිනයක් මැව්නා
කාලයක් ගෙව්නා
දෑස් යුග තෙමුනා
ආදරේ දැනුනා

පින්නේ පිනි සුළගේ 
නිල්ලේ නිල් නෙතගේ
රංචු වෙන සුසුමේ
දැනුනු පෙම් හැඟුමේ

මා සොයන ආදරය කොහෙදෝ තියෙන්නේ
මා පතන ජීවිතේ කවදදෝ ලැබෙන්නේ

යහන මත වැතිරී මවන පෙම් සිහිනේ
දැනෙන සුව ඉතිරී හැඟෙන මේ රහසේ
සෙනෙහස ලබන්නයි
හැඟුමන් විඳින්නයි
පතන්නේ මා සදා මේ මිහිතලේ

දැහැන මත ඇතිරී දැනෙන සුව යහනේ
අහස දුර විසිරී මැවන රෑ තරැසේ
සෙනෙහස ලබන්නයි
හැඟුමන් විඳින්නයි
පතන්නේ මා සදා මේ මිහිතලේ

snippet.title: Suez Canal reopens after giant stranded ship is freed - BBC News
snippet.description:
Traffic has resumed in the Suez Canal after a giant, stranded container ship blocking it for nearly a week was finally freed by salvage crews.

Tug boats honked their horns in celebration as the 400m-long (1,300ft) Ever Given was dislodged on Monday with the help of dredgers and tug boats.

Hundreds of ships are waiting to pass through the canal which links the Mediterranean to the Red Sea via Egypt.

It is one of the world's busiest trade routes.

Please subscribe HERE http://bit.ly/1rbfUog

#BBCNews

snippet.description:
සිංහල අවුරුද්ද ලඟ ලඟම එනවා. අපි හැමෝම අවුරුද්දට නොයෙක් විදිහේ කෑම වර්ග හදනවා. ඒ තමයි අවුරුදු සමරන විදිහ. හැබැයි challenge එකට අවුරුදු කෑම හදන්න වුනොත්...?? කොහොම වෙයිද..? 
B&B අපි, මේ සැරේ අවුරුද්දට අවුරුදු කෑම හදන challenge එකක් දෙන්නයි යන්නෙ. මුලින්ම අපේ challenge එක බාරගත්තෙ මේ දවස්වල ජනප්‍රියම ටෙලි තරු යුවලක් වුනු "සංගීතේ" ටෙලි කතා මාලාවේ තිසංක සර් සහ නිශානි ටීචර්. අපි ඒ දෙන්නට දුන්න challenge එක තමයි "රසට මුංගුලි හදන්න" කියන එක. නිශානි ටීචර් තිසංක සර් එක්ක එකතු වෙලා මුංගුලි හදපු විදිහ ලඟදීම ඔයාලට B&B චැනල් එකෙන් දැකගන්න පුළුවන්.

Subscribe to : https://goo.gl/Ym9F5f 
Like us on Facebook : https://www.facebook.com/boldandbeautifullk/
Follow us on Instagram : https://www.instagram.com/boldandbeautiful_lk/


#BoldandBeautiful #AwruduSpecial #ComingSoon
